official_title: Courts Order No. 1 of 2018 Additional Member of the Small Claims Tribunal of the DIFC Courts JUNE 18, 2018 COURT ADMINISTRATIVE ORDERS Order No. 1 of 2018 in Respect of The DIFC Courts Small DIFC Courts (/glossary/DIFC-courts/) Claims – Additional Member of the Small Claims Tribunal of the DIFCTribunal (/glossary/tribunal/) Courts I, Michael Hwang, of the Dubai International FinancialChief Justice (/glossary/chief-justice/) Centre , Courts (/glossary/court/) Having reviewed— Dubai Law No. 9 of 2004 in respect of the establishment of the ;DIFC (/glossary/DIFC/) Dubai Law No. 12 of 2004 in respect of the Judicial Authority at the DIFC; DIFC Courts Order No. 2 of 2007 establishing the Small Claims Tribunal (“SCT”); DIFC Courts Order No. 1 of 2010 – Limits of ; Jurisdiction (/glossary/jurisdiction/) DIFC Courts Order No. 1 of 2014 – Members of the SCT; DIFC Courts Order No. 1 of 2016 – Additional Members of the SCT; DIFC Courts Order No. 2 of 2016 – Additional Members of the SCT; DIFC Courts Order No. 3 of 2017 – Additional Members of the SCT; Practice Direction No. 2 of 2010 – SCT ; and Judge (/glossary/judge/) Part 53 of the of the DIFC CourtsRules (/glossary/rules/) And Whereas – A.The DIFC Courts Law authorises the Chief Justice of the DIFC Courts, where he considers it appropriate, to set up and administer Tribunals of the DIFC Courts, and to authorise for their administration, including the appointment of its members, which shallrules (/glossary/rules/) be set out in the Rules of (Article 14(3)). Court (/glossary/court/)
